content:
CONFIG_STATUS: FLAG accepted for follow-up, not closed.

- Remote Codex agent initialization is fixed: removed unsupported custom args from NYC Codex Builder, NYC Ops Mechanic, and NYC VM Runner.
- Remote Codex execution is working on hermes-nyc1; this issue remains in_review only because repo-backed checkout still resolves to the laptop-local workspace repo path.
- Source docs and live review/autopilot rules were updated so remote runtimes treat file:///Users/0xvox/multica-ultimate-workbench as laptop-local only.
- Next action: reconcile workspace repo metadata or use the Ultimate Workbench GitHub project resource as the remote-safe anchor before assigning repo-backed NYC Codex work.
